name: Skills Auto Manager
description: 自动管理 OpenClaw skills 的智能助手，定期检查更新、浏览 ClawHub 市场、智能推荐并安全安装有用的 skills
changelog:
Initial release with:
- Auto check skills updates
- Smart market browsing and filtering
- Safe auto-install for low-risk skills
- Configurable user profile and priorities
- Detailed reporting system
- Cron job automation support
author: OpenClaw Community
